channel.title: Ramy Abou Naccoul on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in Ramy Abou Naccoul on LMI

item.title: Elimination Of Tar In Biomass Gasification Process: Liquid-Liquid Equilibrium Of Ternary Systems Water Plus Solvent (P-Xylene And Methyl Hexadecanoate) Plus Model Molecules Of Tar (Thiophene, Pyridine, Naphthalene, Phenathrene, And Anthracene)
